sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n41095" key="e)pistrw/fhsis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπιστρώφ-ησις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n41095.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">going to and fro,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">κατὰ τὸν σύμπαντα κόσμον</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Onat.</author> </bibl> </cit> ap. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Stob.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.1.39</biblScope> </bibl> (pl., <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">-ώσιες</foreign> codd.).</sense> </entryFree>
